applicative errors seen in gate

for basic_cnf: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/jobs/1679396577
no results pushed because exception
see 
   File "/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onaptests/scenario/basic_cnf.py", line 10, in <module>
        from onaptests.steps.instantiate.vf_module_ala_carte import YamlTemplateVfModuleAlaCarteInstantiateStep
      File "/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onaptests/steps/instantiate/vf_module_ala_carte.py", line 8, in <module>
        from onapsdk.so.instantiation import VnfParameter
    ImportError: cannot import name 'VnfParameter' from 'onapsdk.so.instantiation' (/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onapsdk/so/instantiation.py)

for basic_vm: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/jobs/1679376517
same 
      File "/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onaptests/scenario/basic_vm.py", line 10, in <module>
        from onaptests.steps.instantiate.vf_module_ala_carte import YamlTemplateVfModuleAlaCarteInstantiateStep
      File "/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onaptests/steps/instantiate/vf_module_ala_carte.py", line 8, in <module>
        from onapsdk.so.instantiation import VnfParameter
    ImportError: cannot import name 'VnfParameter' from 'onapsdk.so.instantiation' (/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onapsdk/so/instantiation.py)

tests to be aligned in pythonsdk tests
